mapper.insert: insert into dish (name, category_id, price, image, description, status) values (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update:
update dish
name = #{name},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
image = #{image},
description = #{description},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select d.*,c.name as categoryName from dish d left outer join category c on d.category_id = c.id where d.id = #{id}
